channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Async Python: when it helps, when it hurts
item.description: Cut API response time 9.4x with async Python — real benchmarks, httpx vs requests, and the traps that cost 2 weeks of debugging in a fintech microservice.

item.title: Claude reviews my code: blind spots found
item.description: Cut review time in half with 62 real bugs caught using Claude 3.7 Sonnet for code review — actual prompts, benchmarks, and the failure modes most teams miss before production fires.

item.title: AI skills that pay 2026: LLM fine-tuning vs prompt
item.description: See $220k vs $180k salaries in 2026: fine-tuning vs prompt engineering—latency, hallucinations, and the exact data you need to choose. Real benchmarks and cost breakdowns.

item.title: Pick the right African payment API in 30 minutes
item.description: Pick African payment API: ter 100ms 12% of the time during peak hours. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Big Tech exits: the hidden reasons
item.description: ,798 | 97.6% resolution rate | | Mean time with Tech exits reasons — startups or hedge funds for 200k+ TC.

item.title: CS degree won’t save your career
item.description: Senior developers ship under constraints not degrees—real latency, budget, and uptime figures from real systems including a Go API handling 12k req/s under $1.2k/month and a Python pipeline processing 50GB daily with Airflow and dbt.

item.title: Land $120k remote when you're in a $30k city
item.description: y rate by 40% within 90 days because I trea with Land 120k remote you — burning bridges with clients or HR.

item.title: TypeScript strict mode traps: 5 silent footguns
item.description: Cut 3 a.m. incidents by 60%: TypeScript strict mode traps exposed with real benchmarks and fixes for solo founders. Learn the 5 silent footguns that survive tsc --noEmit and the exact commands to audit your codebase today.

item.title: Pick WebSocket vs SSE vs polling in 60 seconds
item.description: Cut real-time infra costs 62% by choosing SSE over WebSockets — latency, CPU, and AWS bill breakdown with 3 concrete protocols compared

item.title: Agentic AI wastes your time first
item.description: Agentic AI wastes solo developers 30 hours before saving time. See the hard numbers, examples, and guardrails that actually work. Real-world benchmarks, Python code, and a decision checklist.

item.title: AI junior devs hit 8x bugs faster
item.description: Cut junior-dev incidents 80% with guardrails — 22 bugs caught vs 8 slips through when AI-only. Includes FastAPI, Prometheus, pre-commit hooks, and 5-week benchmark.

item.title: Vibe coding fails in prod
item.description: Cut API response time by 95% after vibe coding failures — connection pools, query plans, and the staging gap that burned teams. Learn what to instrument first.

item.title: 7 AI pitfalls leaving security gaps in production
item.description: Catch 7 AI-generated code vulnerabilities missed by scanners — hardcoded secrets, SQL injection, memory leaks and more. Reduce production failures by 60% with pre-commit hooks and semgrep.

item.title: AI isn't boosting velocity: measure it or quit
item.description: Cut feature cycle time measurement errors by 60% with AI velocity audits. Measure AI impact on velocity with Linear, GitHub, and Sentry metrics. Stop guessing if AI is helping or hurting.

item.title: Claude Code agents saved us 14 hours weekly
item.description: minutes | 96% reduction | | Documentation a with Claude Code agents saved — solve) Our team spent 20 hours a week on repetitive.

item.title: Python packaging in 2026: what actually works
item.description: Cut Docker image build time 65% and install latency 83% with Python packaging in 2026 — use PDM 2.15.4, hatchling 1.25.0, and uv 0.3.0 for reproducible wheels and multi-platform deployments that actually work in production.

item.title: Instrument 5G latency: the first 3 metrics to watch
item.description: Cut p99 API latency by 75% by measuring 3 cellular metrics first — TCP connect, TLS handshake, and handover spikes — using eBPF, OpenTelemetry and Prometheus on real 5G devices.

item.title: Vector DBs: when brute-force beats similarity search
item.description: Cut API response time by 60% with vector search — pgvector vs Milvus benchmarks, p99 latency, and the exact dataset size when brute-force beats specialized stores.

item.title: Your team needs a paved road before snow hits
item.description: Cut deployment time 73% and on-call incidents 67% with a paved road — the concrete steps, tools, and tradeoffs most guides miss. Includes GitHub Actions workflow, Helm chart, and Backstage setup.

item.title: AI agents overwrote my repo: how to stop them
item.description: Cut production incidents by 40% when AI agents modify code — the real constraints, semantic reviews, and load tests that caught our race conditions and memory leaks
